world.title: What Is Behind Claims of RSF Training Camps in Libya?
world.desc: Talk of ties between Libya's "National Army," led by Field Marshal Khalifa Haftar, and Sudan's Rapid Support Forces (RSF) has resurfaced following fresh allegations that RSF fighters are being trained at camps inside Libya. The army's General Command rejected the allegations, describing them as "part of a campaign aimed at tarnishing its image." A senior Libyan military source on Thursday also denied foreign media reports of RSF training camps in Libya, telling Asharq Al-Awsat that the claims were "baseless."
